originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Eval Hang and Configuring neoc Carbs Baselines for PufferLib Environments
summary: Debugged an eval hang during data collection, fixed a name mismatch in logging, and cleaned up configs for multiple environments. Ran neoc carbs hyperparameter sweeps on pong, triple triad, and connect four to establish baselines.
